final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire d,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= d;  // Write operation
        end
        // else no action, hold the current value
    end
endmodule
